overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a post-apocalyptic landscape during golden hour. She traverses sandy ridges and grassy plains with a massive Tallneck mechanical structure visible in the distance, eventually tilting the camera up to examine the cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy ridge overlooking water with distant mechanical structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a sandy ridge with a large bow on her back, moving toward a distant mechanical structure

entered.detail: massive giraffe-like mechanical structure with a circular head, silhouetted against the golden sky
elevated sandy path with rippled texture from wind erosion
calm reflective water visible in the valley below the ridge
distant rocky mountains with warm golden lighting
dry scrub vegetation scattered along the ridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy ridge during golden hour, with sparse desert vegetation and a calm body of water visible to the right. In the distance, a massive Tallneck mechanical structure dominates the horizon against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed metal ruins in grassland transition

events.description: passing by a collapsed metal structure, transitioning from sandy terrain to grassy plains

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a ruined metal structure, moving from sandy ridge into grassier terrain

entered.detail: collapsed angular metal framework, possibly ancient machinery or building remains

segments.scene_description: The character passes a collapsed metal ruin on the right side as the terrain transitions from sand to grass. The Tallneck remains visible in the left distance while the water body and sandy ridge fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass prairie with distant mechanical structure

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass with the Tallneck structure still visible in the distance to the left

entered.detail: dense golden-green grass covering the ground, swaying slightly
jagged rocky outcroppings on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a field of tall grass with the ruined structure now behind. The Tallneck mechanical structure remains visible to the left while distant rock formations appear on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dramatic sky view with character close-up

events.description: camera tilts upward from horizon to focus on the cloudy sky
character raises hand to ear, activating the Focus device

agents.ego_description: tilting camera up to examine the sky, then touching the ear-mounted Focus device while looking around

entered.detail: dramatic cloud formations with golden sunlight breaking through, filling the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the dramatic cloudy sky during golden hour, with the character visible in close-up. The Tallneck structure moves to the bottom edge of the frame as the character activates her ear-mounted device and surveys the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a post-apocalyptic landscape that transitions from a sandy ridge into a grassy plain before tilting toward the sky. It begins with the character walking along a sandy ridge during golden hour, with a calm body of water to the right and a massive Tallneck mechanical structure dominating the distant horizon. As the character passes a collapsed metal ruin, the terrain shifts from sand to lush grass, leaving the water behind while the Tallneck remains visible to the left. The scene then expands into a field of tall grass, moving past the ruins toward distant rock formations appearing on the right horizon. Finally, the camera tilts upward from the character to focus on the dramatic cloudy sky, pushing the Tallneck to the bottom edge of the frame as the character activates her ear-mounted device.
